problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has a dry-run runtime receipt emitter envelope, but the next evidence boundary for future runner registration and runtime receipt schema binding lacks a schema-backed witness that keeps live runtime authority blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeRunnerBindingWitness validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the runtime receipt emitter dry-run, handoff, binding, lease preflight, and rehearsal receipt evidence
runtime receipt emitter registration remains unperformed
runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed

future dispatch admission remains blocked until live runner registration, dispatch endpoint, runtime emitter, runtime receipt schema binding, temporal lease, UAO, Phi_gov, and effect reconciliation evidence exists
focused tests reject authority drift, registration drift, schema-binding drift, missing refs, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: runtime receipt emitter registration remains unperformed
runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: runtime runner binding witness validator receipt
focused pytest receipt for witness behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
